\tzpentry{ID3879}{Geometricparameters Gyromagnetic Propagator Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3879 introduces Geometricparameters Gyromagnetic Propagator Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \text{GeometricParameters} &:= \{\text{Radius} \to 0.1\text{ m}, \text{Permeability} \to 10^3 \mu_0\} \\ \text{RotationalParameters} &:= \{\omega_{\text{gyro}} \to 10^4\text{ rad/s}, \text{AngularMomentum} \to I\omega_{\text{gyro}}\} \\ \text{MagneticParameters} &:= \{B_{\text{external}} \to 1\text{ T}, \text{Quality} \to Q \sim 10^4\} \\ \text{AcousticParameters} &:= \{f_{\text{range}} \to [10, 100]\text{ kHz}, \text{Transducers} \to 32\} \end{align}
